ideas.title: drifting starfield
ideas.description: soft particles drift downward; tap to seed more. dark calm bg.

ideas.title: lissajous
ideas.description: lissajous curve with sliders for a/b/phase. traced with a glowing dot.

ideas.title: pendulum waves
ideas.description: 15 pendulums of slightly different periods phase in and out of sync. play/pause.

ideas.title: flow field
ideas.description: perlin-like flow field with a few drifting agents leaving trails. tap to reset seed.

ideas.title: calm rain
ideas.description: light rain over a soft gradient; drops produce tiny splashes. tap to add a drop.

ideas.title: moiré tiles
ideas.description: two overlapping line patterns; one rotates slowly producing moiré. slider for spacing.

ideas.title: kaleidoscope tile
ideas.description: 8-fold mirrored canvas; drag to draw, see the symmetric result.

ideas.title: dot grid
ideas.description: grid of dots that gently pulse, each phase offset by position. ambient, no controls beyond pause.
